name: Sadboi in a Sweater - Tuppoc
description:
[Warning: mentions of neglect, horror, psychological trauma, and extreme violence. Proceed with caution and DNI if you are sensitive to these.]

Name: Sadboi in a Sweater

Aliases: Sadboi, Capybara of Tuppoc, The Cube

Relatives: Unknown cubehead mother (biological parent, former), Unknown cubehead father (biological parent, former), Miller (older biological brother, former), Kaia (older biological sister, former), Plasma Bomber (adoptive father), Magnet Bomber (adoptive younger brother), Fractal (adoptive daughter), Mitsura Odykeshi (adoptive daughter)

Affiliation: Mostly anyone, as long as they don't actively provoke her relentlessly. Most notably, she has been shown to know the famous cryptid Mothman and is allies with him.

Occupation: Unofficial guardian of Tuppoc

Marital status: Coconut (wife, former), Blue Bomber (husband, status unknown)

Date of birth: May 29th, 2003

Place of birth: Missouri, USA

Species: Cubehead

Gender: Female

Height: 5ft 9in

Eye color: She has eyeholes :)

Overview:

Sadboi in a Sweater is a light blue female cubehead riddled with various scars. She comes from a world where the supernatural exists and cowers in the shadow of the human race. She arrived in Tuppoc alone and fresh off the heels of being turned into some anthropomorphic snail. She went on to lay her life down to protect Tuppoc until the very day it died, growing her own relationships and somewhat noble reputation despite her troubled past.

History:

Sadboi was originally a sona character for her user of the same name. However, she soon blossomed into her own personality and canon as time went on. Her canon splits on April 1st, 2022, where she started off on the wrong foot when she accidentally started a massive fight in the main area because she felt threatened (and quite a bit sleep-deprived). Upon being forgiven by her opponent Mystery Dude (Prox's version), she swore her life to try and not repeat this same mistake.

Early Life:

Not too much is known about Sadboi's life before Tuppoc, at least to the public. She had a normal life in her biological family: a father, a mother, and two older siblings, at least, up until the accident happened. When Sadboi was ten years old, she had a horrific run-in with a human, with the only alive part of the young cubehead being her head; from then on, she lived as a parasite, using the bodies of others to try and live a normal life. Up until the moment Sadboi entered Tuppoc, she lived on the run; escaping the grubby mitts of the United States Supernatural Department, fearing for her life and freedom. This fact was not helped by the fact that she was essentially disowned by her family and ran away after she got fed up with their negligence. This resulted in a large amount of mostly unhealed trauma because she faced brutal violence and witnessed many deaths as a child and teen, as well as attachment and abandonment issues. She used, and still uses, media as a form of escapism, to block out all the horrible things.

Tuppocalypse Life:

While living in Tuppocalypse, Sadboi (sort of) learned how to make friends and began building her own support system from scratch. She would begin meditating in order to help with her emotions, although this led to her learning special vibesense skills that, currently, no other cubehead has. She would also protect her newfound relationships from other threats like the Exclamation Empire; for that whole adventure, there is supposedly a statue of her in her honor somewhere in Tuppoc. She has also associated with a version of Perfect Cell, helping him to create a new (and horrifically stronger) body; this and she also has associated with all of the Bomberman bombers (Plasma Bomber is her adoptive dad, Magnet Bomber is her adoptive brother, and Blue Bomber is her husband). She used to also pull the eye of many a resident: Gluttony (Retrospecter version), REC, Aqua, and a few others are known to have had previous romantic inter
creator: Sadboi in a Sweater
